ddls:
CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "invoice_no" TEXT /* Invoice number assigned to each transaction */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the invoice was generated */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer being invoiced */,
  "gross_revenue" REAL /* Total gross revenue from the invoice */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the invoice */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount including tax */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the invoice */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in the invoice */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice to which the item belongs */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code for the item sold */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item sold */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the item */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the item */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the item */,
  "stock_quantity_before" INTEGER /* Stock quantity before the item was sold */,
  "stock_quantity_after" INTEGER /* Stock quantity after the item was sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "preference" TEXT /* Customer preferences (e.g., preferred communication method, product preferences) */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date for which the report is generated */,
  "total_invoices" INTEGER /* Total number of invoices generated on that date */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated on that date */,
  "average_invoice_amount" REAL /* Average amount per invoice */,
  "total_customers" INTEGER /* Total number of unique customers */,
  "top_product" TEXT /* Top-selling product */,
  "top_customer" TEXT /* Top-spending customer */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales staff, manager, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
